---
title: "Liqun Peng: Power System Decarbonization"
description: " "
image: /files/headshots/liqun-peng.jpg
author: "Climate Guest Speakers"
date: "2024-10-28"
categories: [Climate Insights]
#page-layout: full
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 300px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://liqunpeng.com/  #linkedin profile or personal website
      image: /files/headshots/liqun-peng.jpg
      title: "Liqun Peng"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Post-doc, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title



### Time

Monday, October 28, 2024, 6:00PM - 7:00PM ET

### Venue 
Online via zoom. Please [register](https://forms.gle/65hnhJPmnYaz5utG9) to participate.

## About

More information about the speaker's session.

## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio



## Readings



<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
